1.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 1 (57 genes)
1.functional_description: Enriched for photosystem I (p=1.5e-09) and photosystem II (p=2.5e-05) genes, including reaction center genes psbA and psbD.
1.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 8.3 h (about 2.3 hours after dawn) with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Expression of approximately half of photosystem (PS) II genes, including reaction center genes psbA and psbD, peak in abundance at mid-day

Periodicity patterns of photosynthesis genes fell into 4 clusters (Table 1). Expression of approximately half of photosystem (PS) II genes, including reaction center genes psbA and psbD (encoding D1 and D2 respectively), as well as psbC (CP43) and psbF, co-varied with light intensity, with maxima at mid-day, and minima in the middle of the night (Figure 4A, Table S4)

10.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 10 (77 genes)
10.temporal_pattern: Genes peak at 0.3 h (just after dark) with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: The size of the clusters ranged from 22 to 138 (average 88) genes and peak transcription levels of the clusters were spread fairly evenly over the photocycle, with the exception of clusters 12 and 13, and 14 and 15, which had peak expression times less than one half hour apart.

10.assessment_notes: No specific functional description or enrichment reported for cluster 10.

16.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 16 (125 genes)
16.functional_description: Enriched for ATP synthase (8/8 genes, p=8.4e-08) and CO2 metabolism (7/9 genes, p=1.8e-05).
16.temporal_pattern: Genes peak at 5.5 h (early morning) with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 16 is significantly enriched for ATP synthase (8/8 genes, p=8.4e-08) and CO2 metabolism (7/9 genes, p=1.8e-05)

17.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 17 (173 genes)
17.assessment_notes: Cluster 17 is aperiodic expressed genes, no temporal pattern or functional enrichment.

18.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 18 (180 genes)
18.functional_description: Enriched for menaquinone and ubiquinone genes (6/9 genes, p=0.00045).

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 18 is non-expressed genes but enriched for menaquinone and ubiquinone genes (6/9 genes, p=0.00045)

18.assessment_notes: Cluster 18 is mostly non-expressed genes but shows enrichment for menaquinone and ubiquinone.

3.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 3 (23 genes)
3.functional_description: Enriched for cytochrome b6/f (3/7 genes, p=0.0059) and photosystem II (8/22 genes, p=3.7e-08).
3.temporal_pattern: Genes peak at 12.5 h (mid-day) with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 3 is enriched for cytochrome b6/f (3/7 genes, p=0.0059) and photosystem II (8/22 genes, p=3.7e-08)

4.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 4 (62 genes)
4.functional_description: Marginal enrichment for cytochrome b6/f (3/7 genes, p=0.073).
4.temporal_pattern: Genes peak at 15.8 h (afternoon) with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 4 shows marginal enrichment for cytochrome b6/f (3/7 genes, p=0.073)

4.assessment_notes: Enrichment is marginal and not statistically significant.

5.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 5 (120 genes)
5.functional_description: Enriched for respiratory terminal oxidases (3/3 genes, p=0.019) and degradation of proteins, peptides, and glycopeptides (5/15 genes, p=0.071).
5.temporal_pattern: Genes peak at 17.5 h (evening) with 24h periodicity.
5.enrichment_category: Respiratory terminal oxidases and protein degradation

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 5 is enriched for respiratory terminal oxidases (3/3 genes, p=0.019) and degradation of proteins, peptides, and glycopeptides (5/15 genes, p=0.071)
